description.short: Push selected product rows to your Shopify store
description.long: Reads selected rows from a vault smart-table and publishes each as a Shopify product via the configured Admin API. Stub manifest — real OAuth + API wiring lands with the Shopify MCP server in v1.1.

actions.name: Publish Selected Rows
actions.description: Publish the selected smart-table rows to Shopify

steps.message: → Shopify publish queued (impl pending — see roadmap)
